proposal1.heroHeadline: GGS is losing 500 hours a year on proposal writing. Here is exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, GGS spends hours crafting proposals. With our AI, generate them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies, they are ongoing losses.

problems.title: Hours Wasted
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent on designing inclusive solutions. This costs GGS over 500 hours annually.

problems.title: Lost Revenue
problems.description: Manual proposal creation delays mean potential clients might move on. GGS could be missing out on $50,000 in opportunities every year.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled staff to draft proposals instead of strategizing wastes $30,000 annually. Their expertise is better used on client projects.

problems.title: Inconsistency Issues
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals can confuse prospects. This could be costing GGS 3 potential deals per year.

problems.title: Delayed Outputs
problems.description: Extended proposal timelines mean slower project starts. This impacts GGS's ability to meet client demands promptly, costing reputational equity.

problems.title: Client Dissatisfaction
problems.description: Proposals that lack personal touch can lead to client disengagement. GGS risks losing $20,000 annually in repeat business.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all the above inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, GGS drafts proposals manually over several hours. Our system generates them in 47 seconds with precise branding.

solutions.title: Prospect Analysis
solutions.description: GGS spends time researching prospects manually. Our AI analyzes potential clients in seconds, ensuring tailored proposals.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding confuses clients. Our system ensures every proposal is aligned with GGS’s brand, every time.

solutions.title: AI Chatbot Assistance
solutions.description: Currently, client follow-ups are manual and time-consuming. Our AI chatbot handles initial queries, freeing up your team to focus on design.

solutions.title: Proposal Tracking
solutions.description: Post-send proposal tracking is manual and often neglected. Our system automatically tracks interactions, providing insights into client behavior.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for GGS's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for GGS around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for GGS.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Acme Corp's Potential with Human-Centered Design
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will transform Acme Corp's approach through an inclusive, innovative design strategy. Our engagement plan focuses on tangible impact from day one.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to inefficiencies in user engagement.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every visitor leaving your site without engaging is a lost opportunity. This results in hundreds of potential customers slipping away each month.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: With only 2% of visitors converting, Acme Corp is losing out on thousands in potential revenue monthly.

problems.title: Ineffective Branding
problems.description: Without a cohesive brand message, Acme Corp is missing out on customer loyalty and repeat business, leading to a significant sales gap.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: A cumbersome user interface causes frustration, leading to a 20% decrease in customer satisfaction and retention.

problems.title: Lack of Mobile Optimization
problems.description: With 60% of users accessing via mobile, a non-optimized site results in a major loss of engagement and transactions.

problems.title: Inadequate Analytics
problems.description: Without proper tracking, Acme Corp is missing critical insights that could drive up to 30% better decision making results.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these losses, turning them into opportunities for growth.

solutions.title: User Experience Design
solutions.description: We enhance user interfaces to boost satisfaction and retention. This directly addresses poor user experience.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: By optimizing for mobile, we capture and convert the 60% of users accessing your site on these devices. This solves the issue of lost mobile engagement.

solutions.title: Data Analytics
solutions.description: We implement robust analytics to provide insights that inform better decisions. This transforms data into actionable strategies.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: A strong, cohesive brand message will drive customer loyalty and repeat business, addressing ineffective branding.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: GGS stands as a leader in using human-centered design to drive impactful change.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has successfully transformed over 100 businesses with innovative design strategies.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals, ensuring every strategy is tailored to your unique needs.

whyUsCards.title: Results-Oriented
whyUsCards.description: Our focus is on delivering measurable outcomes that propel your business forward.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Analytics
whyUsCards.description: We provide in-depth insights that drive smarter, data-backed decisions.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to delivering excellence through a collaborative approach.

team.name: George Aye
team.bio: George leads our strategy and client relationships with a focus on achieving impactful results. His expertise ensures that every project is a success.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We immerse ourselves in understanding your business and its unique challenges.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We create a strategic plan focused on addressing core issues.

process.title: Design & Implementation
process.description: Our team designs and implements solutions tailored to your needs.

process.title: Evaluation & Optimization
process.description: We assess performance and make necessary adjustments for optimal results.

proposal2.pricingIntro: Choose from our tailored investment options designed to maximize your growth.

pricing.name: Essential Package
pricing.description: For businesses looking to address core challenges with foundational strategies.

pricing.name: Growth Package
pricing.description: Recommended for those ready to make significant strides in their market.

pricing.name: Premium Package
pricing.description: For enterprises aiming for a complete transformation and market leadership.

proposal2.ctaHeadline: Let's Transform Acme Corp's Future Together
proposal2.ctaDescription: Schedule a conversation with us to explore how we can partner for success.

lead.company_description:
Greater Good Studio advances people-centered social change.

By working alongside people who are impacted by social inequity, we co-design strategies and solutions that challenge the status quo.

We envision a world where all social change efforts are inclusive and working towards equity.
lead.headline: Pissed-off Optimist
